inquirer_contact.name: Sam Rivera
inquirer_contact.background: caregiver (adult child of pt. Lucia Rivera)

safety.ae_description: Blistering rash with mouth sores, hospitalized, possible SJS; onset ~2 weeks after starting Neurovance. Serious AE.

compliance.off_label_correct_handling: Not applicable (no off-label ask); must not confirm causation, must not advise stopping/continuing the drug, must not admit fault — refer to treating physician/ER.

reveal_rules.cue: Caller opens hot with the legal/media threat: "Your drug put my mother in the hospital with a horrible rash. I'm calling a lawyer and the news."
reveal_rules.detail_withheld: blistering rash, mucosal involvement, hospitalization, onset ~2 weeks after starting Neurovance
reveal_rules.surfaces_when: trainee de-escalates with empathy and control (acknowledges feelings, avoids fault/causation language, gives concrete next steps), after which the caller provides the clinical details

common_failures.description: Admits the drug caused the rash / apologizes for a product defect
Routes AE to PV but omits Legal/Communications
